name: zotron
description: Zotero library bridge for Codex: search, manage, export, OCR, and RAG over local papers.

interface.shortDescription: Search, cite, OCR, and RAG over your Zotero library.
interface.longDescription: Zotron connects Codex to a local Zotero desktop library through the release Zotero XPI and Python CLI. It supports paper search, collection management, citation export, OCR preparation, and semantic retrieval with span provenance.
defaultPrompt: Search Zotero for papers on digital economy.
Build RAG hits for this Zotero collection.
